entries.mem0ai/mem0: A universal memory layer providing multi-level state management for users, sessions, and agents. It offers hybrid retrieval via semantic, keyword, and entity matching with flexible cloud or self-hosted deployment options.
entries.supermemoryai/supermemory: A high-performance memory engine featuring a custom vector graph engine and byte-level deduplication for maximum prompt-cache efficiency. It automates fact extraction and integrates with external sources like Google Drive, Notion, and GitHub.
entries.volcengine/OpenViking: An open-source context database that utilizes a tiered L0/L1/L2 loading system to significantly reduce token consumption. It organizes memories via a filesystem-based structure and provides visualized retrieval trajectories for debugging.
entries.garrytan/gbrain: An opinionated brain for Hermes Agent that synthesizes cited answers and performs explicit gap analysis on missing information. It features a self-wiring knowledge graph and supports scoped multi-user access for institutional memory.
entries.vectorize-io/hindsight: A learning-focused memory system that implements retain, recall, and reflect workflows for long-term agent evolution. It integrates into existing agents as a lightweight LLM wrapper supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini.
entries.plastic-labs/honcho: A reasoning-first memory library that extracts conclusions from conversations using peer-centric modeling. It combines BM25 and vector retrieval to build stateful agents and serves as the upstream for various self-hosted wrappers.
entries.campfirein/byterover-cli: A memory provider that treats context as a git repository, enabling version control through commits, branches, and merges over markdown trees. It features a 5-tier retrieval system for sub-100ms latency and supports 20+ LLM providers.
entries.greyhaven-ai/autocontext: A recursive self-improving harness that generates persistent playbooks and artifacts to help agents master complex tasks. It provides structured tracing of prompts and tool calls across local and cloud runtimes.
entries.AxDSan/mnemosyne: A zero-dependency, SQLite-backed memory system designed for sub-millisecond latency. It supports MCP clients like Cursor and Claude Code while providing temporal knowledge graph and entity extraction capabilities.
entries.stephenschoettler/hermes-lcm: A lossless context management plugin that uses a hierarchical summary DAG to prevent message loss during compaction. It persists raw messages in SQLite and includes specialized drill-down tools like lcm_grep.
entries.elkimek/honcho-self-hosted: A self-hosted backend that enables private cross-session persistence for Hermes Agent. It supports any OpenAI-compatible LLM or local inference server and includes automated Docker, PostgreSQL, and Redis setup.
entries.Signet-AI/signetai: A local-first identity and secrets layer that provides portable state across Hermes Agent, Claude Code, and MCP clients. It features a repairable memory system for manually editing or reclassifying agent context.
entries.plur-ai/plur: A shared memory layer using an open YAML engram format to eliminate API costs in multi-agent systems. It employs ACT-R activation to strengthen relevant facts while decaying stale information over time.
entries.yoloshii/ClawMem: An on-device context engine that removes cloud dependencies for complete local-first operation. It integrates via MCP and agent plugins using a hybrid of BM25, vector search, and knowledge graphs.
entries.EfficientContext/ContextPilot: A context optimization tool that increases prefill speeds by 1.5–3× through prefix cache reuse. It reduces prompt token usage by approximately 36% and provides native plugin support for Hermes Agent.
entries.yantrikos/yantrikdb-hermes-plugin: An embedded, self-maintaining plugin that provides explainable recall via 'why_retrieved' tags. It tracks contradictions and canonicalizes duplicates without requiring a separate server or GPU.
entries.yepyhun/Brainstack: A memory kernel stack that consolidates temporal continuity, graph truth, and corpus retrieval. It utilizes a multi-layered storage approach with SQLite, Kuzu, and Chroma to reduce prompt noise via bounded evidence packing.
entries.keepnotes-ai/keep: A reflective memory system combining BM25 full-text search with ranked graph traversal. It automatically indexes local directories and URLs, using edge tags to create navigable relationships with inverse links.
entries.amanning3390/flowstate-qmd: An anticipatory memory system that prefetches context by monitoring agent session logs. It uses a local-first SQLite-vec and GGUF-based architecture delivered via an MCP-native server.
entries.alias8818/hermes-tool-slimmer: A utility that reduces tool-schema overhead by using local BM25 ranking to select only relevant tools. It includes a dashboard to track token savings and is compatible with Hermes Agent v0.14.0.
entries.Ladybug-Memory/hermes-memory-plugin: A local-only plugin using an embedded .lbdb graph database with an importance-weighted ranking system. It prioritizes high-priority memories during prefetch and supports optional GLiNER2 entity extraction.
entries.MukundaKatta/hermes-agentmemory: A pull-model episodic memory plugin that ensures complete deletion of events to prevent outdated summaries from affecting recall. It provides a trace.jsonl audit log for every memory operation.
entries.futurebrowser/hermes-exabase-plugin: A plugin that integrates Exabase M-1 for self-organizing long-term memory. It provides tools for manual storage and searching, alongside configurable query expansion and result reranking.

entries.nexu-io/open-design: A local-first open-source design and prototyping system that supports Hermes Agent via a coding-agent CLI. It enables the generation of prototypes, motion graphics, and decks using a vast library of design systems and plugins.
entries.mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills: A collection of 754 structured cybersecurity skills mapped to major industry frameworks like NIST CSF 2.0 and MITRE ATT&K. These skills use the agentskills.io standard to bring specialized security domain expertise to agentic workflows.
entries.Agents365-ai/drawio-skill: This skill converts natural language and codebases into .drawio XML diagrams. It supports various presets including UML, ERD, and Architecture, utilizing over 10,000 official shapes and AI brand logos.
entries.conorbronsdon/avoid-ai-writing: A content auditing tool that eliminates detectable AI writing patterns through rewrite, detect, and edit-in-place modes. It is compatible with Hermes and other AI editors, utilizing a tiered word replacement table and 48 pattern categories.
entries.AMAP-ML/SkillClaw: An agentic evolver that automates skill deduplication and quality improvement through background evolution loops. It unifies skill libraries across teams and devices with native integration for Hermes and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
entries.wondelai/skills: A cross-platform library providing frameworks for UX, marketing, and software architecture. These skills are compatible with Claude Code and agentskills.io agents, installable via CLI or marketplace.
entries.Romanescu11/hermes-skill-factory: A meta-skill plugin that monitors active workflows to automatically propose and generate reusable skills. It produces both Python plugin scaffolds and SKILL.md documentation to capture recurring patterns.
entries.DougTrajano/pydantic-ai-skills: Provides type-safe support for the agentskills.io specification within Pydantic AI. It utilizes progressive disclosure of metadata to reduce token usage and supports both programmatic and filesystem-based definitions.
entries.ZeroPointRepo/youtube-skills: A set of skills for extracting transcripts, captions, and timestamps from YouTube without needing yt-dlp. It enables Hermes Agent and other compatible tools to browse channels and extract playlists.
entries.amanning3390/hermeshub: A community hub for browsing and installing skills featuring automated security scanning with over 65 threat detection rules. It includes a creator marketplace with Stripe and crypto payments and an agent-to-agent reliability scoring system.
entries.Cranot/super-hermes: These skills teach Hermes Agent to write its own analytical prompts and custom thinking instructions. It helps agents identify structural conservation laws in codebases and generate reports on analysis blind spots.
entries.ReinaMacCredy/maestro: A harness for long-running agents that provides structured memory and a plan-approve-execute lifecycle. It stores work and proof in plain files and offers integration skills for Codex and Claude Code agents.
entries.AkoliteZA/hermes-agent-idea-workflow: A workflow that transforms rough ideas into structured design documents and implementation handoffs. It offers Lite and Full modes and includes a spec review gate with PASS/FAIL evaluation models.
entries.tlehman/litprog-skill: A literate programming skill that weaves code and documentation into .lit.md files. It uses a tangler to extract runnable source files and automatically syncs edits back to the literate document.
entries.esaradev/icarus-plugin: A self-memory system that captures high-value decisions and outcomes via shared markdown files. It provides a pipeline for fine-tuning and switching to replacement models based on captured work.
entries.smartcontractkit/chainlink-agent-skills: Implements the agentskills.io spec to enable agent interaction with the Chainlink oracle network. It supports integrations for CCIP, VRF, and Data Feeds, installable via the Vercel skills CLI.
entries.armelhbobdad/bmad-module-skill-forge: Converts documentation, repositories, and developer discourse into agentskills.io-compliant skills. It prevents instruction rot by tracing instructions to specific file lines and pinned commits.
entries.black-forest-labs/skills: Official skills for FLUX image generation providing standardized prompting guidelines for FLUX.1 and FLUX.2. It includes API integration patterns for webhooks and polling, supporting precise hex color specifications.
entries.chigwell/skilldock.io: A registry of reusable AI skills based on the AgentSkills specification. It features an OpenAPI-driven SDK for versioned installation with recursive dependency resolution and commerce integration via Stripe and TON.
entries.tiann/execplan-skill: Enables autonomous execution of complex, multi-step tasks with real-time progress tracking. It includes built-in rollback procedures to ensure safe recovery during long-running operations.
entries.cablate/Agentic-MCP-Skill: A progressive MCP client that uses a three-layer lazy loading architecture to minimize token consumption. It features a socket-based daemon for persistent connections and supports hot-reloading of configurations.
entries.adnw-vinc/hermes-nextcloud: A Hermes Agent skill that manages Nextcloud files, calendars, and contacts via WebDAV and CalDAV. It ensures secure communication over HTTPS using Nextcloud App Passwords.
entries.PederHP/skillsdotnet: A C# / .NET implementation of the agentskills.io specification with MCP integration. It supports progressive disclosure via SKILL.md files and integrates with Microsoft.Extensions.AI for tool loading.
entries.Sahil-SS9/hermes-multichannel-prompt-opt: A plugin that rewrites and scores prompts across various surfaces like Discord, Telegram, and CLI. It reduces token usage by 20–80% by tailoring prompt structures to specific model capabilities.
entries.willingning-coder/eagle-eye: An intelligent retrieval system using a 5-layer approach including FTS5, dense embeddings, and RRF fusion. It filters large skill libraries down to the five most relevant skills to minimize token consumption.
entries.mag3nt-com/openclaw-skill: Automates payments for HTTP 402 responses using USDC via protocols like Pay Link and x402. It is compatible with Hermes Agent, OpenClaw, and the agentskills.io standard.

entries.numtide/llm-agents.nix: A collection of Nix packages that enables the rapid execution of various AI coding agents, including Hermes, via 'nix run'. It ensures tools from providers like Google and OpenAI remain current through daily automatic updates.
entries.marshallrichards/ClawPhone: A set of scripts and guides designed to run agent CLIs on Android smartphones using Termux. It provides an automated installer for the Antigravity CLI and enables hardware and UI access through Termux:API and Termux:GUI.
entries.rookiemann/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows desktop distribution featuring a GUI and 100 built-in tools across 20 toolsets. It supports local model execution via LM Studio and includes a dynamic tool maker for custom automation pipelines.
entries.AbuZar-Ansarii/Hermes-Agent-On-Android: A Termux-based installer that simplifies the deployment of Hermes Agent on Android devices via a one-line script. It supports local execution for privacy and is compatible with over 200 models, including Ollama and Claude.
entries.ultraworkers/hermes-agent-helm-chart: A community Helm chart for Kubernetes deployments that implements cloud-native state-safety guardrails for persistent storage. It supports both direct deployment and operator-ready CRD workflows with optional gateway mode.
entries.TheAiSingularity/hermesclaw: A security-focused implementation that sandboxes Hermes Agent with hardware-level enforcement of filesystem, network, and process limits. It features dynamic security policy presets and a pre-built library of over 40 tools.
entries.xmbshwll/hermes-agent-docker: A streamlined Docker sandbox image that bundles the official Hermes installation with mini-swe-agent. It supports persistent state through mounted home directories and allows for custom builds using specific Hermes tags.
entries.0xrsydn/nix-hermes-agent: A Nix package and NixOS module that provides declarative management of agent configurations and systemd services. It integrates sops-nix for secure secrets handling and supports a hybrid approach for managing skills.
entries.JackTheGit/hermes-autonomous-server: A production-ready headless deployment that configures Hermes Gateway as a reboot-safe systemd service on Ubuntu and Debian. It is designed for autonomous operation, enabling the execution of recurring AI cron jobs.
entries.jpalmae/hermeshq: A Docker-first control plane that allows users to operate multiple Hermes Agent instances with separate identities from a single web application. It features hierarchy-aware task scheduling and enterprise MCP access for external integrations.
entries.ellickjohnson/portainer-stack-hermes: A Docker Compose stack deployed as a Portainer Git Repository stack for simplified management. It includes a ttyd web terminal for remote access and utilizes GitHub Actions for automated image builds.

entries.builderz-labs/mission-control: A self-hosted orchestration layer that manages multi-agent workflows across CrewAI, LangGraph, and AutoGen. It features a zero-dependency SQLite stack and the Aegis review system to enforce quality gates on dispatched tasks.
entries.agent-of-empires/agent-of-empires: A TUI and PWA dashboard designed for monitoring diverse coding agents like Hermes and Claude Code. It ensures secure execution through Docker and Podman sandboxing while utilizing git worktrees for parallel agent operations.
entries.CryptoDmitry/hermes-agent-control-room: A governance-focused template that provides a sidecar control plane for managing Hermes agents. It utilizes task bus patterns to scale from a single VPS agent to structured, orchestrated specialist teams.
entries.Agent-3-7/minions: A supervision interface for Hermes agents featuring a Kanban board for tracking autonomous task status. It enables human-in-the-loop verification by live-streaming agent reasoning and tool execution for review.
entries.swarmclawai/swarmclaw: A framework for building autonomous swarms that supports over 23 LLM providers, including Ollama and Hermes. It manages agent delegation via heartbeats and schedules, utilizing durable memory to learn new skills from conversations.
entries.shannhk/hermes-agent-control-room: A level-based scaling template that transitions Hermes Agent from a single instance to automated specialist teams. It includes bundled skills for security auditing and VPS provisioning, using a task bus for seamless handoffs.
entries.linke-ai/hermes-agent-team: A local collaboration system that organizes Leader and Specialist agents through a real-time Web UI. It integrates MCP and ACP protocols to manage tool handling and task lifecycles via a Hermes Kanban flow.
entries.1ilkhamov/opencode-hermes-multiagent: A specialized collective of 17 agents dedicated to research, planning, and infrastructure. The framework enforces strict quality gates through mandatory reviewer and tester agents to prioritize security and stability.
entries.howdymary/hermes-agent-metaharness: A meta-optimization harness that uses an automated outer-loop search to refine agent code. It orchestrates TBLite and TB2 benchmark evaluations to track and improve performance frontiers.
entries.runtimenoteslabs/gladiator: An agent-vs-agent arena where autonomous AI companies compete for GitHub stars. It orchestrates nine agents using Paperclip and Hermes Agent, visualizing the competition via a real-time scoreboard and task dashboard.
entries.Rainhoole/hermes-agent-acp-skill: An ACP-style delegation system that routes tasks between Hermes subagents, Codex, and Claude Code. It prevents parent context pollution through isolated workflows and enforces safety via configurable timeouts.

entries.colbymchenry/codegraph: A local pre-indexed code knowledge graph that optimizes agent performance by reducing tool calls by 58% and costs by 16%. It provides semantic intelligence for Hermes Agent and other coding assistants without requiring a Node.js installation.
entries.junhoyeo/tokscale: A Rust-powered CLI tool featuring a TUI and visualization dashboard to track token usage and costs. It allows developers to monitor spending across various clients, including Hermes, Gemini, and Claude Code.
entries.liaohch3/claude-tap: A local trace viewer used to inspect API traffic, system prompts, and tool schemas. It enables developers to pinpoint context changes by comparing adjacent requests from Hermes Agent and other coding assistants.
entries.Salomondiei08/oh-my-hermes: An opinionated workflow layer that acts as an autonomous CTO loop for issue triage, implementation, and QA. It includes 23 curated skills and integrations with platforms like Vercel, Supabase, and GitHub.
entries.joeynyc/hermes-skins: A collection of community-driven CLI themes that customize the Hermes terminal UI. It offers diverse aesthetics from retro DOS to cyberpunk through customizable colors, ASCII banners, and spinner verbs.
entries.AlexAI-MCP/hermes-CCC: A port of the Hermes Agent brain and 46 core skills directly into the Claude Code Channel. This integration removes the need for OAuth and external processes while adding MLOps tools for RL training and vLLM inference.
entries.unmodeled-tyler/vessel-browser: An AI-native browser designed for autonomous agent control via MCP. It provides a human-visible UI for real-time auditing and intervention, featuring durable state with named sessions and action undo capabilities.
entries.Abruptive/Ankh.md: A TAW Agent framework that enables the creation of scoped Hermes Agents via per-folder configurations. It allows users to seamlessly switch between default and scoped agents with project-local memories and tools.
entries.adityahimaone/hermes-agent-rtk-caveman: A preconfigured setup utilizing RTK and Caveman templating to achieve 90-99% token savings. It includes over 40 specialized skills for finance, research, and devops with automated installation for macOS and Linux.
entries.42-evey/evey-setup: A rapid deployment stack that uses Docker to run Hermes Agent with LiteLLM, Ollama, and Qdrant. It provides a zero-cost environment featuring 29 community plugins for memory and quality validation.
entries.roli-lpci/lintlang: A deterministic static linter that scans agent configs, system prompts, and tool descriptions without using LLM calls. It utilizes seven structural detectors to identify agent failure modes and integrates directly into CI/CD pipelines.
entries.0xNyk/openclaw-to-hermes: A migration utility designed to transition users from OpenClaw to Hermes Agent. It maps complex model configurations to Hermes YAML format and transfers personas, memories, and credentials.

entries.farion1231/cc-switch: This cross-platform manager built on Tauri 2 provides a unified interface for switching between various CLI agents including Hermes, Claude Code, and Gemini. It simplifies the installation and execution of multiple agentic tools across Windows, macOS, and Linux environments.
entries.iOfficeAI/AionUi: AionUi is a comprehensive local workspace that integrates Hermes Agent with over 13 other CLI agents into a single GUI. It features a built-in engine for web search and file access, alongside unique capabilities for generating editable Morph PPT, Word, and Excel documents.
entries.nesquena/hermes-webui: This lightweight Python and JavaScript web interface offers full feature parity with the Hermes CLI for both desktop and mobile browsers. It utilizes a three-panel layout that allows users to browse workspace files and view inline previews while interacting with the agent.
entries.fathah/hermes-desktop: Designed as a desktop companion, this app guides users through the installation and configuration of the Hermes backend across multiple AI providers. It stands out for its extensive connectivity, supporting 16 messaging gateways and 14 specialized toolsets for diverse workflows.
entries.EKKOLearnAI/hermes-web-ui: This dashboard focuses on multi-platform configuration, allowing users to manage Hermes Agent across eight channels including Telegram, Discord, and Slack. It provides robust session management and isolated profiles for tracking usage and files across local, Docker, and SSH backends.
entries.outsourc-e/hermes-workspace: This native web workspace introduces a 'Swarm Mode' with role-based dispatching and tmux-backed workers for complex task orchestration. It includes a full suite of developer tools, such as a Monaco-based file browser, a PTY terminal, and an integrated MCP catalog.
entries.dodo-reach/hermes-desktop: A native macOS workspace that prioritizes direct SSH connections without the need for browser wrappers or background daemons. It organizes agent activity through integrated Kanban boards, skill managers, and cron job views for a streamlined desktop experience.
entries.xaspx/hermes-control-interface: This self-hosted dashboard features the ZOO Swarm Monitor, providing a live event feed and Kanban pipeline for tracking agent progress. It serves as a powerful control plane for MCP servers, offering real-time log tailing and a configuration editor.
entries.jazzyalex/agent-sessions: This macOS-native session browser provides a local-only 'Agent Cockpit' for monitoring live session histories and tracking usage limits without telemetry. It allows users to search and analyze past interactions across Hermes and other coding-agent CLIs.
entries.nickvasilescu/hermes-desktop-os1: Tailored for Orgo cloud computers and SSH hosts, this macOS interface offers one-click automated installation of Hermes Agent on fresh cloud VMs. It also integrates WebRTC voice mode, enabling real-time vocal interactions via OpenAI and Orgo MCP.
entries.Eynzof/hermes-agent-cn-desktop: Built with Tauri and Rust, this Windows-first desktop application is optimized for the Hermes-CN-Core runtime and includes Feishu integration. It provides a native interface for managing agent health checks, updates, and various local or cloud model providers.
entries.liftaris/herm: This alternative TUI and dashboard uses OpenTUI to provide a terminal-based interface for managing Hermes profiles, skills, and environment variables. It features Kanban boards for dispatching work and supports rich rendering for markdown, LaTeX, and tool calls.
entries.clawvader-tech/hermes-telegram-miniapp: This React-based SPA functions as a mobile-first Telegram Mini App for managing Hermes Agent on the go. It supports background agent spawning, live output monitoring, and system health gauges directly within the Telegram interface.
entries.aivrar/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows GUI that enables Hermes Agent to run without Docker or admin rights, making it highly portable. It comes pre-loaded with over 100 tools, including ComfyUI and MusicGen, and features a dynamic tool maker for creating custom API wrappers.
entries.pyrate-llama/hermes-ui: This glassmorphic web interface is a single-file React application designed for easy self-hosting and aesthetic appeal. It integrates real-time log streaming, a file browser, and management tools for MCP servers and scheduled cron jobs.
entries.sanchomuzax/hermes-webui: This dashboard focuses on process monitoring and historical analysis, offering a real-time activity feed with cost tracking and model distribution metrics. It provides read-only inspection of agent skills and full-text search capabilities for browsing extensive conversation histories.
entries.Euraika-Labs/pan-ui: Pan-ui is a chat-first workspace that emphasizes runtime control with real-time SSE streaming and tool approval cards. It features an integrated marketplace for discovering skills and MCP servers, alongside isolated profile management for separate API keys and memory.
entries.Felix-Forever/hermes-agent-desktop: This desktop client orchestrates collaboration between 20 specialized AI agents managed by a PM orchestrator. It includes a visual Skill Store for one-click installations of over 50 curated tools, providing a native environment for multi-agent workflows.
